package rulecoverage

func NegativePanicStackTraceToClient() string {
    ruleID := "panic_stack_trace_to_client"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`recover()` in HTTP middleware that sends the panic message/stack to the response writer"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
